L2_brief: Hologic reported Q1 2026 revenue of $1.05 billion, up 2.5% year-over-year, but net income declined to $179.1 million ($0.79 EPS) from $201.0 million ($0.87 EPS) in the prior year. The company has a definitive merger agreement with Blackstone and TPG for $76.00 per share plus up to $3.00 CVR, expected to close in the first half of calendar 2026. A voluntary recall of Brevera 9 Gauge Needles was implemented following internal review of post-market data.

financial_performance.revenue: $1,047.8 million, up 2.5% from $1,021.8 million in Q1 2025
financial_performance.net_income: $179.1 million, down from $201.0 million in Q1 2025
financial_performance.eps: Diluted EPS $0.79, down from $0.87 in Q1 2025
financial_performance.free_cash_flow: Operating cash flow $229.9 million vs $189.3 million in Q1 2025
other_metrics: Effective tax rate 22.0% vs 18.8% prior year

segment_performance: Product revenues increased $13.5 million or 1.7% to $831.4 million
Service and other revenues increased $12.5 million or 6.1% to $216.4 million
L3_detailed.guidance_and_outlook: CVR payments contingent on achieving certain global revenue metrics for Breast Health business in fiscal 2026 and 2027. Brevera 9 Gauge Needles stop-ship may be prolonged as company re-engineers manufacturing process.

balance_sheet_highlights.total_debt: $2,508.7 million including $1,169 million term loan and $1,350 million senior notes

risk_factors: Timing and receipt of governmental and regulatory approvals for proposed merger
Supply chain constraints and cost inflation including $15.3 million tariff cost increase
Cybersecurity threats and targeted computer crime
Interest rate risk on variable rate debt

ma_and_deal_relevance.pending_deals: Definitive merger agreement with Blackstone and TPG for $76.00 per share plus up to $3.00 CVR, total up to $79.00 per share
ma_and_deal_relevance.deal_impact: Transaction expected to close in first half of calendar 2026 subject to stockholder approval and regulatory approvals. Purported stockholder lawsuits filed challenging merger proxy disclosures.
ma_and_deal_relevance.strategic_alternatives: Company expects to continue reviewing and evaluating potential strategic transactions
ma_and_deal_relevance.acquisition_activity: Gynesonics acquisition completed January 2, 2025 for $340.7 million purchase price. Strategic investment in Maverix Medical LLC with 45% ownership and $27.2 million net investment.

legal_and_regulatory: BioZorb litigation settlement reached with no financial liability to company, fully covered by insurance
Voluntary field safety notice and recall of Brevera 9 Gauge Needles issued January 2026
key_developments: Brevera 9 Gauge Needles stop-ship implemented mid-November 2025 following internal review
Manchester manufacturing facility ceased production in mid-November 2025
Discontinuing sale of Fluoroscan Insight FD systems effective in fiscal 2026
No stock option grants in Q1 2026 pursuant to merger agreement
L3_detailed.capital_allocation: New stock repurchase program authorized for up to $1.5 billion with $937.5 million remaining unused. Interest expense decreased to $27.6 million from $30.5 million due to debt refinancing.
